name: Mississippi Mud Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the butter and eggs. Add the cocoa powder.
2. Stir in the vanilla extract, flour, and pecans (if using).
3. Pour the batter into a greased 11 x 14-inch pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
6. Spread about three-quarters of the marshmallow creme evenly over the top of the cake.
7. Mix the frosting ingredients in a separate bowl until smooth.
8. Spread the frosting over the marshmallow topping.
